===[[Pokémon Pokopia]]===
Sabrina is the subject of the [[Human Records|Human Record]] "Sabrina Sets Sights on Big Screen!", which states that she was to appear in a new movie produced by [[Pokéstar Studios]]. The record can be found in [[Sparkling Skylands]] in the ruins of the Saffron Gym. Reading this record rewards {{poko|Ditto}} with the Psychic Master outfit, which resembles Sabrina.
